caption_text:
.. the aura in the Forum got spiritual.. 

when I talked to @kevinhart4real earlier in the day, we made a pact - we wouldn’t tell each other what we were going to say or do… 

brotherly love and trust .. just let it happen… 

i came to burn this muthafucka down 💀😎

#kevinhartroast
@netflix

Two-division @UFC Champion. One division left.

My brother @Alexpoatanpereira is going somewhere no fighter has ever gone.

But before he makes history, it starts the same way it always does. Back to the beginning. Back to the man who had nothing but hunger and will.

That feeling never leaves you.

caption_text:
Look at their happy faces!! 😂🥰👊🏾

What can I say except ~ YOU’RE WELCOOOOME 🎶 

To the awesome students at @StGregoryPrimarySudbury in the UK 🇬🇧I LOVED your video!! 

You’re all my special guests to watch live action MOANA on JULY 10! 

🎬 Theater = rented out

🍿🥤🍭 Popcorn + candy + drinks = on me

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Friends & family = bring ‘em all

I apologize to your parents in advance for all the sugar 🍬🤣

Have so much FUN watching the movie, keep working hard in school and if you’re having a bad day ~ just remember that you’re all taller than Kevin Hart 😉

~ Uncle Maui🪝

caption_text:
The Met 🥂

We had a very cool and great time - our first trip  celebrating fashion’s biggest night. 

Thank you to our visionary icon, and friend @thombrowne and his entire team of inspiring and beautifully kind artists. 

Experiencing the ceremony and pageantry of “art through fashion” and individual artistic expression made for one unforgettable night! 

Here’s the wild breakdown 👇🏾🤯 of our Thom Brown expressions - cheers and thanks for all the cool comments. We had a blast!! 🥂🤎

THE MORTAL BODY by Thom Brown 
 
DWAYNE JOHNSON wears a black 3 ply mohair tailcoat with a back detail of a tonal silk ribbon applique of a skeleton paying homage to specifically the mortality and body section of the exhibition. The look is paired with a matching pleated skirt and trousers with a white silk faille vest and pique wing collar shirt. 

FACTS:
50 people involved in the making of his look
over 2,000 hours to complete
over 350 metres of silk ribbon used
 
Shoe: Black pebble wingtip boot
 
 
LAUREN HASHIAN wears a white silk crepe halter neck dress featuring a tonal silk ribbon appliqué of the female anatomy. 

FACTS:
35 people involved in the making of this look
800 hours to complete
160 meters of silk ribbon used

Together, Dwayne and Lauren play on the mortal/ immortal duality. 

 
#themet #nyc #theblueshadababy

📸 @ThisIsAmandaW
📸 @KevinMazur
📸 @donetodeathprojects 
📸 Taylor Hill 
📸 @TheStewartofNY 
📸 @GettyImages

My brother @Yomicoart has been my tattoo artist for years, and we’ve told stories of the spirit of the bull - and the mana and power of the ocean through the art on my body.

If you’re in NYC - pull up!! Yomico and @PapaTui_  are teaming up at the @NyEmpireStateTattooExpo in NYC starting next week on 5/22 and we’ll have thousands of our award winning PapaTui products for you to try and take home ‼️ 

Yomico’s praise for our @PapaTui_ Tattoo 360° Spray means a lot - he’s an artist deeply committed to the care and preservation of body art. 

Shout to @MensHealthMag awarding our PapaTui Tattoo Spray a 2026 GROOMING AWARD 🥇 and grateful to have the trust of Yomico and our tattoo culture. 

~ dj
#PapaTui 
#TattooCare 
#TheArtThatDiesWithUs

🥂 

our final fitting for the met gala, on a beautiful sunday afternoon in nyc with @thombrowne and his extraordinary cadre of boundlessly artistic folks..

..even down to the socks in the last pic 🧦😎👊🏾

Johnson Aiga x T & K x Nonosina 🤍
Thank you Seiuli Dwayne Johnson, Lauren Johnson and Aunty Ata for all the love shown to Nonosina’s 60th. And we can’t forget our Jazzy & Tia being part of the cast! Last year was such a special one for us. While we were celebrating that milestone, the 4 of us were also stepping into something new together that had already quietly started the year before.

Now here we are in 2026… still creating, still building, still learning each other through love, loyalty, mana, friendship, and music. 

🎤 Lauren, thank you for being the voice of our 61st anthem (feat. in this post!) What you brought to it was beautiful, honest, and full of heart. We’re grateful for you far beyond the music. Somewhere along the way this became bigger than collaboration. You became family to us. Faafetai lava brother Zayah for creating this melody! 

There’s something powerful about building with people you genuinely love, trust, and stay solid with. Friendship, partnership, loyalty, and MUSICship ;) all tied together. The real relationships behind the work are the part we hold closest.

As we continue this journey, we hope to honor the voices of our ancestors while uplifting the voices of today and carrying our people with us every step of the way.

Lastly to our Happy Jewelers family! Thank you Gabe for always bringing custom pieces to life with love & care every time. Here’s to many more milestones together. Huge mahalo to Connie for building this concept together. 

🎼 (Lead Vocal) Lauren (BGV) Zayah, Halia 
🎥 Happy Jewelrs x Team DJ edit 
🎨 Design inspired by our fam, Allek Gaoay and the mural our Nonosina wall. Thank you Allek, Alyssa & Kona for blessing our creative space with your art. 

T & K

coauthor_producers.full_name: L I N D S E Y  •  V O N N

caption_text:
… in the flesh … 
dwayne johnson and lauren hashian wear custom thom browne for the 2026 met gala.

together, dwayne and lauren embody thom’s vision of strength and elegance playing on the mortal and immortal duality of bodies past, present and future...
#thombrowne #dwaynejohnson #laurenhashian #metgala
